name: Q-Gold Resources Ltd.
description: Q-Gold Resources Ltd. is a junior gold explorer and developer focused on the flagship Quartz Mountain Gold Project in Lake County, Oregon, acquired from Alamos Gold in 2025, and the Mine Centre gold project in northwestern Ontario. A maiden Preliminary Economic Assessment released in April 2026 demonstrated an After-Tax NPV(5%) of US$1.71 billion for Quartz Mountain at a 24-month trailing average gold price.
